page.title: First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)

revision.text:
[[de:Erste Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs|TITEL=Erste Nachtstunde|name=N14-X1:Z1-N2-D1:X1|NAME-TRANSKRIPTION=Wenut-tepit-gereh
''Wnwt-tpj.t-grḥ''
''Erste Stunde der Nacht''|name2=H4-X1-F4:X1*Z1-A14-Z1:Z1:Z1|NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION=[[Uschmet-haut-cheftiu-es]]
''Wšmt-ḥ3wt-ḫftjw=s''
''Die die Stirnen der Feinde zerschmettert''|BILD1=Von der daemmerung zur nacht.gif|BILD1-BREITE=280px|BILD1-BESCHREIBUNG=Abenddämmerung als erste Nachtstunde}} In {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|qid=Q11768|lt=ancient Egypt,|1=Ancient Egypt}} the first '''hour''' of the night referred to {{ill|Twilight|en|Twilight|qid=Q164160|lt=Twilight|1=Twilight}}, which began at the end of {{ill|Sunset|en|Sunset|qid=Q166564|lt=Sunset|1=Sunset}} . [[Religion of ancient Egypt|Mythologically,]] since the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom,|1=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}} the first hour of the night was under the patronage of {{ill|Isis|en|Isis|qid=Q79876|lt=Isis|1=Isis}} as the goddess of light and {{ill|Keku-semau|lt=darkness|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keku-semau|qq=}} . The first hour of the night {{ill|Symbol|en|Symbol|qid=Q80071|lt=symbolized|1=Symbol}} in particular the time of the {{ill|acronychic|lt=Acronychic|de|Akronychisch|1=Acronychic|simple|User:Immanuelle/acronychic|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/acronychic|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qid=Q4059812}} {{ill|Decan|en|Decan|qid=Q5248738|lt=Decan sunsets|1=Decan}} as the hour of death of the {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=|qid=Q804527}} and thus as the hour of birth of the {{ill|Chatiu demons|de|Chatiu-Dämonen|1=Chatiu demons|2=de|3=Chatiu-Dämonen|4=es|5=Demonios chatiu|6=pt|7=Daemons-Chatiu|1=Chatiu demons|2=de|3=Chatiu-Dämonen|4=es|5=Demonios chatiu|6=pt|7=Daemons-Chatiu|es|Demonios_chatiu|pt|Daemons-Chatiu|1=Chatiu demons|2=de|3=Chatiu-Dämonen|4=es|5=Demonios chatiu|6=pt|7=Daemons-Chatiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chatiu demons|qid=Q1068237}} . Since the {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom,|1=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}} the first hour of the night was of particular importance as a time measurement with regard to the acronychal decan {{ill|culmination|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/culmination|qq=}} on the {{ill|Star clock|lt=Diagonal Star Clocks|de|Diagonalsternuhr|en|lt_original=Diagonalsternuhr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Star clock|qid=Q142353|1=Star clock}} . The [[:de:Inschrift|inscriptions]] of the {{ill|Naos of the Decades|en|Naos of the Decades|qid=Q1964833|lt=Naos of the Decades|1=Naos of the Decades}} show that the {{ill|Astrology|en|Astrology|qid=Q34362|lt=astrological|1=Astrology}} effectiveness of the respective decan constellation of a decade ended with the {{ill|acronychic|lt=Acronychic|de|Akronychisch|1=Acronychic|simple|User:Immanuelle/acronychic|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/acronychic|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qid=Q4059812}} setting in the first hour of the night. == See also == * {{ill|Amduat|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amduat|qq=}} * {{ill|Hour deities|de|Stundengottheiten|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hour deities|qid=Q2359142|1=Hour deities}} == literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|fr|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qid=Q1080802|1=Christian Leitz}} : ''Ancient Egyptian star clocks'' . Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 9-0683-1669-9 * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} : ''Outline of the course of the stars – The so-called Nutbook'' . The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (u. a.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5 == Weblinks == * [http://www.amduat-achilles.de/stunden/1farbig900x583.png Amduat: 1.] [http://www.amduat-achilles.de/stunden/1farbig900x583.png Night hour] {{translated page|de|Erste Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)|version=201666404|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Erste Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)]] [[fr:User:Immanuelle/First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)]] {{wikidata link|Q1361948}} [[Category:Amduat (1. Nachtstunde)]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian astronomy]] [[Category:Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:History of timekeeping]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
